instructions: TEST FIXTURE NOTE: This file uses Satisfaction With Life Scale (SWLS) question content as test data to validate the assessment engine's handling of a 1-7 scale. It is NOT intended as a clinical or research instrument. -- Original instructions: Below are five statements that you may agree or disagree with. Using the 1-7 scale below, indicate your agreement with each item.

questions.text: In most ways my life is close to my ideal.
The conditions of my life are excellent.
I am satisfied with my life.
So far I have gotten the important things I want in life.
If I could live my life over, I would change almost nothing.
